typecheck.summary: TypeScript compilation successful with no errors

lint.summary: ESLint passed with no warnings or errors

featureReviews.summary: AuthAPIClient correctly implements login, register, logout methods. Token storage via localStorage works correctly. Authorization header included in API requests.
Zustand auth store properly manages isAuthenticated, currentUser, authToken state. loadToken initializes from localStorage. getAuthHeaders returns proper Authorization header object.
LoginScreen component renders correctly with username/password fields, shows error messages on failure, links to register page, and navigates to home on success.
RegisterScreen component includes username/password fields, integrates PasswordGuidance component, and submits successfully regardless of password strength (advisory only).
PasswordGuidance displays 5 checkmarks that update reactively as user types. Each criterion (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special) shows green when met. No blocking validation.
ProtectedRoute component guards /session, /history, /history/:sessionId, /profile, /settings routes. GuestRoute guards /login and /register, redirecting authenticated users to home.
Logout button in Navigation component clears auth state and redirects to /login. Button only visible when isAuthenticated is true.
AuthGateway component replaces onboarding flow. Root route (/) shows LoginScreen if not authenticated, HomePage if authenticated. No separate profile creation step.
